delegation.delegation_quote_verbatim: 이 정도는 그냥 너가 판단해도 되는 수준
delegation.delegation_scope: routine same-class judgments delegated to the orchestrator; the orchestrator viewed the C4 render crops directly and adjudicated the strict residue (10 blocking visual_clash candidates) into 3 real repairable defects and 6 confirmed false positives.

finding.summary: Close the check_visual_clash --strict residue on C4: 10 blocking text_on_path candidates. Orchestrator crop review splits them into 3 real label/path overlaps (repair) and 6 confirmed false positives (declare via the existing fixture-scoped known-FP mechanism).

real_defects_to_repair.label: constant voltage
real_defects_to_repair.defect: apparatus-box top border line crosses the glyph tops (dark 0.213/0.208)

real_defects_to_repair.label: probe
real_defects_to_repair.defect: the probe horizontal wire grazes the glyph tops (dark 0.187)

real_defects_to_repair.label: floating polymer cantilever
real_defects_to_repair.defect: a trapped-charge sphere sits on the letters 'er' and the beam passes behind the word (dark 0.112)

confirmed_false_positives.ground: Panel A title tail; own-glyph antialiased halo grazes the thin (0.32pt) panel-frame line, no real path collision.
Panel C corner tag; bold-glyph halo near the thin frame line, no real collision.
Panel E bold panel-letter; own-glyph halo near the thin frame line, not a real path crossing.
Panel F bold panel-letter; own-glyph halo near the thin frame line, not a real path crossing.
Panel E title head; bold-title glyph halo near the thin frame line, no real collision.
Panel E 'Vs' meter label; adequately separated from its own Vs-meter box border (box-border proximity, not a real overlap).

adjudication.false_positive_mechanism: the existing fixture-scoped known-FP mechanism consumed by check_visual_clash --ignore-known-fp (_known_false_positives.yaml at the plugin root). Six glyph-scoped, fixture-scoped patterns added with tight dark/edge bounds and per-entry ground text. No new suppression mechanism invented.

authorized: bounded position/anchor repair of the 3 real defect labels
declare the 6 confirmed false positives via the existing known-FP yaml (glyph + fixture scoped, tight bounds)
not_authorized: final C5 development verdict is issued by the orchestrator under delegation (recorded separately)
suppressing any real defect, or an unscoped/loose FP pattern
any publication acceptance; strict first-green is a machine-valid layer only
